c.d: Whether the app is available on iOS, Android, or both platforms
Free, freemium with premium upgrade, subscription-based, or paid
Number of available podcast titles in the app's database
How easy and intuitive the app is to use, especially for new podcast listeners
Availability of advanced playback controls such as voice boost, trim silence, variable speed, and sleep timer
Quality of podcast discovery tools such as curated playlists, personalized recommendations, and search features
Level of data collection and permissions required, relevant especially for privacy-conscious users
Access to exclusive or original podcast content or features unique to the app
